direct_measurement_closure: available only where source exposes the required measurement; otherwise explicit unknown

T1-A.rule: temperature <=25 -> not_fire_forming; temperature >=60 -> fire_forming; otherwise insufficient_information

T1-B.rule: temperature <=25 -> non_fire; temperature >=60 -> fire; otherwise insufficient_information

T1-C.rule: query the available next observation when it can reduce the current uncertainty; otherwise stop

T2-A.rule: temperature <=25 -> baseline_or_no_fire; temperature >=60 -> developed_or_peak; otherwise forming_or_early

T2-B.rule: without discriminating flow or geometry evidence, emit mechanism_unknown

T2-C.rule: compare paired observations and emit consistent, inconsistent, or insufficient_information

T3-A.rule: derive trend from ordered numeric observations and abstain when the trend is not identifiable

T3-B.rule: pair only same smoke configuration with ignition position as the single changed variable

T3-C.rule: emit trace_unknown when no source trace can be reconstructed; never invent a causal trace

known_gaps: Expert adjudication has not been performed.
D02 legacy XLS remains unreadable without an external converter.
Mechanism and causal labels are abstention labels when the source has no discriminating evidence.
